issue_summary: Improved or corrected javadoc; added some tests.
javadoc_before:
/** * Returns the R-Squared statistic, defined by the formula 
     * R2 = 1 - SSR / SSTO
     *
* where SSR is the {@link #calculateResidualSumOfSquares() sum of squared residuals} * and SSTO is the {@link #calculateTotalSumOfSquares() total sum of squares} * * @return R-square statistic * @throws MathIllegalArgumentException if the sample has not been set or does * not contain at least 3 observations * @since 2.2 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Returns the R-Squared statistic, defined by the formula 
     * R2 = 1 - SSR / SSTO
     *
* where SSR is the {@link #calculateResidualSumOfSquares() sum of squared residuals} * and SSTO is the {@link #calculateTotalSumOfSquares() total sum of squares} * *

If there is no variance in y, i.e., SSTO = 0, NaN is returned.

* * @return R-square statistic * @throws NullPointerException if the sample has not been set * @throws org.apache.commons.math3.linear.SingularMatrixException if the design matrix is singular * @since 2.2 */
